action_breakdown:
# Shot 26 Action Breakdown

Scope: only Shot 26 (`websiteHero`, 5.7-10.2s from the reference analysis). This is a brand-free motion reconstruction for review, not a factory template.

- `approved`: false
- `allowedInFactory`: false
- Source behavior abstracted: browser/page hero window slides into view, main headline reveals, supporting text follows, feature/icon chips cascade, browser content rows stagger in.
- Source content excluded: original brand, logo, exact text, website screenshots, colors, and layout-specific copy.

## Timeline

| Time | Layer | Action | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 0.00-0.45s | background | Soft gradient and perspective grid settle | Establishes depth without copying source visuals. |
| 0.20-0.75s | label | Template label fades and rises | Acts as a replaceable eyebrow. |
| 0.45-1.35s | browser | Browser frame slides from right/bottom, scales 0.88 to 1.0, rotates into position | Main `browserWindowSlide` atom. |
| 0.75-1.50s | headline | Large hero headline rises from 54px offset | Main `heroTextReveal` atom. |
| 1.05-1.80s | browser content | Hero block inside browser fades/rises | Keeps the browser from feeling like a static screenshot. |
| 1.15-1.80s | subcopy | Supporting copy follows headline | Delayed hierarchy reveal. |
| 1.25-2.14s | browser rows | Four content rows stagger from right | Secondary page-detail build. |
| 1.80-2.93s | feature chips | Three cards cascade with slight overshoot | Main `iconCascade` atom. |
| 0.00-4.50s | camera | Slow global settle and parallax | Choreography glue; prevents PPT-style static composition. |
| 0.00-4.50s | scan | Light scan moves across browser | Optional accent, should remain subtle. |

## Reuse Boundaries

- Suitable for any website/app landing page if the browser content is generated from props.
- Requires safe-area clamps for headline, subcopy, browser frame, and icon chips.
- Should not use screenshots or text from the source reference.
- Decorative scan and grid are optional; core value is the browser-window + hierarchy + cascade choreography.

choreography.name: websiteHero_browserWalkthrough_choreography
choreography.description: A generic website hero shot: browser frame lands first, headline hierarchy reveals, browser content builds, then feature cards cascade as supporting proof.

composition.primaryFocus: browser frame plus left-side hero message

sequence.intent: Create spatial depth before the primary browser frame arrives.
Make the website/browser the core evidence object.
Reveal eyebrow, headline, and subcopy in priority order.
Turn the browser from a static mockup into an active page walkthrough.
Add three benefit markers after the main frame is legible.
Hold the composition long enough for review without adding new semantic content.

risks: Long headlines can overflow left safe area if not measured and scaled.
Too many feature chips can create random floating decoration.
Browser content rows must be generated from real product/story data, not meaningless placeholders.
Scan accent should be optional and low opacity.
factoryReadinessChecklist: Add prop schema for headline, subcopy, browser rows, and feature chips.
Add text measurement or max-line enforcement.
Add mobile/social crop variants before factory access.
Human review required before changing approved or allowedInFactory.

animationTracks.purpose: Bring the background grid and soft atmosphere into a stable parallax field.
Bind the shot with a slow push-in.
Introduce the generic website interface as the main visual evidence.
Reveal the replaceable title after the website frame starts settling.
Call out the most important website region.
Cascade reusable value cards after the primary website area is readable.
Settle the full layout for final readability.
